posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Community!

We’ve made further progress in improving the MasterPlan Calendar.
Check out the latest features we’ve added:

  1. Custom Initial Date: Need to focus on a future project or event? You can now set the calendar to load on your preferred date.
  2. Toggle Additional Info for “All Day” Events: Choose whether to show or hide extra details for all-day events.
  3. Design and Performance Enhancements: We’ve enhanced performance and made some small design improvements.

Explore these new features, along with a variety of other settings and customization options, in the advanced calendar on monday. Try it with a 14-day free trial: Click here to install it on your monday account

Stay tuned—exciting and significant improvements are on the way!
